reviews.comment:
A pesar de no haber renovado la estética a la última adoptada por YPF, exceelnte los chicos de playa, buen shop, buenos baños, limpios, estacionamiento. Buena parada para estirar las piernas si el viaje es largo

(Translated by Google)
Despite not having updated its aesthetics to match the latest YPF practices, the beach staff are excellent, the shop is good, the restrooms are clean, and the parking is good. A good stop to stretch your legs on a long trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13657899365243523321/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpeWRTMTBBRRAB
